CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.PaymentMethod__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. The selected value is automatically copied to each related Payment record created by NPPatch.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the payment method for this recurring donation (e.g., Check, Credit Card, ACH). Copied to each installment Payment.
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Payment Method
